response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates 20 years of strong technical experience and excellent builder capabilities with entrepreneurial background, they lack the critical AI/ML expertise and demonstrated AI platforms that are core to a Principal Engineer role focused on AI Strategy. AI experience appears limited to recent engagement (April 2025) at re:cinq without yet showing the depth required for this specialized position.
strengths: 20 years of technical experience exceeding the 15-year requirement across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure)
Founder of GISCollective with proven ability to build platforms, attract users, and deliver long-term products
Full-stack builder with staff-level IC experience and fluency across 10+ languages and cloud technologies
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product or platform built—critical gap for a role specifically requiring 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'
AI experience limited to 6 months in current role with MCP and agent infrastructure; no evidence of depth in algorithms, model training, or ML systems
No Master's or PhD in AI field and no published research or thought leadership in AI strategy—misses preferred qualifications

key_factors.factor: Strong technical foundation and builder capability
Recent and unproven AI role transition
